sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Strategic Advisors LLC Invests $1.02 Million in Lowe's Companies, Inc. $LOW
feed.summary: Strategic Advisors LLC acquired 4,042 shares of Lowe's Companies, Inc., valued at approximately $1.02 million, during the third quarter, bringing institutional ownership of the stock to 74.06%. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average price target of $283.65, while the company reported strong Q3 earnings of $3.06 EPS, a quarterly dividend of $1.20, and CEO Marvin Ellison sold 18,000 shares.

feed.title: Synopsys, Inc. $SNPS Shares Purchased by Strategic Advisors LLC
feed.summary: Strategic Advisors LLC increased its stake in Synopsys (NASDAQ:SNPS) by 76.3% in the third quarter, now holding 7,578 shares valued at $3.74 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings, contributing to hedge funds and institutional investors owning 85.47% of the stock. Synopsys recently beat EPS expectations, with revenue up 37.8% year-over-year, and has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $553.57.

feed.title: Customers push back on Xcel power shutoffs during Public Utilities Commission feedback session Wednesday
feed.summary: Community members, business owners, and city leaders expressed frustration during a Public Utilities Commission (PUC) feedback session regarding Xcel Energy's recent power shutoffs. While acknowledging the need for wildfire mitigation, customers argued that power shutoffs cannot be the only solution and highlighted significant financial losses and personal hardship. The PUC plans to develop new rules for utility companies by the end of the year based on this feedback.

feed.title: $0.53 per share: Kentucky bank sets next quarterly dividend
feed.summary: Community Trust Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ-CTBI) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.53 per share. This dividend will be paid on April 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 15, 2026. The bank, headquartered in Pikeville, Kentucky, manages $6.7 billion in assets and operates numerous banking and trust locations across Kentucky, West Virginia, and Tennessee.

feed.title: United Airlines Holdings Inc $UAL Shares Purchased by Hollencrest Capital Management
feed.summary: Hollencrest Capital Management significantly increased its stake in United Airlines Holdings Inc ($UAL) by 180,270%, now owning 18,037 shares valued at $1.74 million. This comes as United Airlines reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates with $3.10 EPS and $15.40 billion in revenue, and provided optimistic guidance for FY2026. Despite CEO J. Scott Kirby selling 120,000 shares, the stock maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts with an average price target of $136.

feed.title: Paragon Advisors LLC Acquires New Holdings in GE Vernova Inc. $GEV
feed.summary: Paragon Advisors LLC has acquired a new stake of 1,505 shares in GE Vernova Inc., valued at approximately $925,000, during the third quarter. This comes as major institutional investors like Vanguard and State Street also maintain or increase their significant holdings in the company. GE Vernova recently reported strong Q4 results, surpassing earnings expectations and raising its FY2026 revenue guidance, despite a valuation noted as stretched by analysts.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Confirms Discovery Class, Places Order with the Chantiers de l’Atlantique
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean has announced its new "Discovery Class" of ships, with an order placed for two vessels from the Chantiers de l’Atlantique shipyard in France. The first ship is expected to debut in 2029, followed by the second in 2032, with options for four more. This new class aims to offer a bold concept focusing on guest experiences and potentially smaller ships, continuing Royal Caribbean's long-standing relationship with the shipyard.

feed.title: ICE announces record OI across its futures and options markets
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (ICE) announced record open interest (OI) across its global futures and options markets, reaching over 114 million contracts on January 26, 2026, an approximately 20% increase year-over-year. The records include significant growth in global commodities, energy, oil, and EU natural gas futures and options. Trabue Bland, SVP of Futures Markets at ICE, attributed these achievements to customer trust in the liquidity of ICE's benchmarks.

feed.title: Honeywell guidance tops estimates as aerospace separation looms
feed.summary: Honeywell has provided robust guidance that exceeds analyst estimates, indicating strong performance ahead. This positive outlook comes as the company prepares for a significant separation of its aerospace unit. The strategic move is expected to create two focused entities, potentially unlocking further value for shareholders.

feed.title: Arista Networks, Inc. $ANET Shares Sold by Paragon Advisors LLC
feed.summary: Paragon Advisors LLC significantly reduced its stake in Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) by 23.8% in Q3, selling 11,199 shares and retaining 35,843 shares valued at approximately $5.22 million. This move positions ANET as its 15th-largest holding. The article also highlights recent insider selling by CEO Jayshree Ullal and Kenneth Duda, with a total of 216,464 shares worth about $27.7 million sold by insiders in the last quarter, though institutional investors collectively own 82.47% of the stock. Arista Networks itself reported strong Q3 earnings, beating analyst estimates with an EPS of $0.75 and revenue of $2.31 billion, a 27.5% year-over-year increase.

feed.title: Kapitalo Investimentos Ltda Raises Position in The Walt Disney Company $DIS
feed.summary: Kapitalo Investimentos Ltda significantly increased its stake in The Walt Disney Company (NYSE:DIS) by 64.6% in Q3, now holding 73,890 shares valued at $8.46 million, making Disney its 11th-largest holding. The company recently beat EPS estimates, declared a $0.75 dividend, and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus analyst rating with an average target price of $135.20. Upcoming Q1 earnings are a key catalyst, with investors focused on streaming metrics and operational costs amidst mixed sentiment points including franchise success and weather-related disruptions.

feed.title: C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. (NASDAQ:CHRW) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. (NASDAQ:CHRW) held its Q4 2025 earnings call, discussing its performance in a challenging macroeconomic environment characterized by weak global freight demand and falling ocean rates. Despite these headwinds, the company reported market share growth, particularly in its North American Surface Transportation (NAST) segment, and expanded gross margins in Global Forwarding. Executives highlighted their "lean AI" strategy, combining operational efficiency, technology, and human expertise to drive productivity gains, reduce costs, and enhance customer service, while expressing confidence in achieving their 2026 operating income targets.

feed.title: Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADP) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (ADP) reported strong Q2 2026 results, with 6% revenue growth, 80 basis points of adjusted EBIT margin expansion, and 11% adjusted EPS growth, exceeding expectations. The company saw solid new business bookings, especially in international, US enterprise, and compliance, and achieved its best-ever client satisfaction scores. ADP is focusing on strategic priorities like best-in-class HCM technology with platforms like Workforce Now NextGen and Lyric, and expanding its expertise in outsourcing solutions and global scale, while also raising its fiscal 2026 consolidated revenue and adjusted EPS growth outlooks.

feed.title: Elevance Health Inc. (NYSE:ELV) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Elevance Health Inc. (NYSE:ELV) reported Q4 2025 earnings per share of $3.33, exceeding expectations, and provided 2026 adjusted diluted EPS guidance of at least $25.50. The company discussed strategic repositioning, particularly in its Medicaid and Medicare Advantage segments, to strengthen margins and ensure sustainable growth despite anticipated membership declines. Management expressed confidence in returning to at least 12% adjusted EPS growth in 2027, driven by a diversified platform and disciplined execution.

feed.title: Danaher Corporation (NYSE:DHR) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Danaher Corporation reported a strong finish to 2025, with Q4 earnings exceeding expectations, driven by solid performance in bioprocessing and improving momentum in diagnostics and life sciences. The company provided a 2026 core revenue growth outlook of 3% to 6% and adjusted diluted EPS guidance of $8.35 to $8.50, anticipating continued gradual recovery in end markets. Key growth drivers include robust demand for biologics, advancements in life science research, and expanded diagnostic solutions, with an underlying expectation for long-term growth as market conditions normalize.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean orders new Discovery class plus 10 more river vessels
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has ordered two new Discovery-class ships from Chantiers de l'Atlantique, with options for four more, and committed to adding 10 river vessels for Celebrity Cruises, bringing their river fleet total to 20 by 2031. The first Discovery ship is expected in 2029, while the expansion of Celebrity River Cruises follows high demand, with the 2028 season already open for booking. This announcement coincides with Royal Caribbean's Q4 adjusted net income of $2.80 per share on $4.3 billion in revenue.

feed.title: Strategic Advisors LLC Reduces Stock Holdings in Emerson Electric Co. $EMR
feed.summary: Strategic Advisors LLC decreased its stake in Emerson Electric Co. by 13.8% in Q3, selling 8,627 shares and now owning 53,939 shares valued at approximately $7.08 million. While Strategic Advisors LLC reduced its holdings, other major institutions like Norges Bank and JPMorgan Chase & Co. significantly increased their positions in the company, with institutional investors collectively owning about 74.3% of Emerson Electric. Analysts maintain a "Hold" rating with an average price target of $154.76, and the company has issued positive FY2026 EPS guidance and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Autodesk to cut 7% of workforce as part of go-to-market strategy
feed.summary: Autodesk announced plans to reduce its global workforce by approximately 7%, impacting about 1,000 employees, primarily in sales. This decision is part of its multi-year go-to-market strategy, established in 2025. CEO Andrew Anagnost stated that these layoffs are a deliberate alignment with long-term strategy and not driven by the external environment or AI replacement.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher (NYSE:TMO) Posts Better-Than-Expected Sales In Q4 CY2025
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher (NYSE:TMO) reported better-than-expected Q4 CY2025 results, with revenue of $12.22 billion surpassing analyst estimates by 2.1% and non-GAAP EPS of $6.57 beating consensus by 1.9%. While the company's revenue growth has slowed over the past two years, organic revenue was flat, indicating core operations drove the results. Despite a slight miss on adjusted EBITDA and a flat operating margin year-over-year, the company's performance led to a immediate stock increase.

feed.title: Newmont Corporation Rose 11% Last Week. Here’s How Much Upside the Stock Could Have by 2026
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation's stock increased by 11% last week, reaching near its 52-week high, driven by rising gold prices and strong analyst sentiment. The TIKR valuation model projects a target price of $138, indicating a 4.3% upside over the next 1.9 years, suggesting the stock is currently undervalued. Future performance hinges on gold price trends and the company's operational efficiency in converting higher gold prices into free cash flow.

feed.title: L3Harris Technologies (LHX) Q4 Earnings Beat Expectations, Reven
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies reported Q4 Non-GAAP EPS that beat estimates, though revenue slightly missed projections. The company demonstrated financial strength by raising its quarterly dividend and projects positive outlooks for FY26. Despite some financial stress indicated by its Altman Z-Score and declining gross margins, L3Harris maintains a stable financial position and strong institutional ownership.

feed.title: GPS Wealth Strategies Group LLC Raises Stake in GE Vernova Inc. $GEV
feed.summary: GPS Wealth Strategies Group LLC significantly increased its stake in GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE:GEV) by 105.7% in Q3, now holding 14,050 shares valued at $8.64 million. This move comes as GE Vernova reported strong Q4 earnings, boosting its FY2026 revenue outlook and doubling its dividend, although the stock's high valuation and a one-time tax benefit in EPS are noted concerns. Other hedge funds also adjusted their positions in GEV, and analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" rating on the stock.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp to name CEO Kedia chairman as Cecere plans retirement
feed.summary: Gunjan Kedia, CEO of U.S. Bancorp, will also assume the role of chairman of the board, a year after becoming CEO. This transition is consistent with prior practices at U.S. Bank. The article also mentions the upcoming 29th annual Women in Business awards by the Business Journal.

feed.title: Here Are Thursday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Agnico Eagle, First Solar, Fortinet, General Motors, NVR, StoneCo, Werner Enterprises, Zillow, and More
feed.summary: This article summarizes top Wall Street analyst upgrades, downgrades, and initiations for several companies on Thursday, January 29, 2026. It also provides a market overview, noting that the Federal Reserve kept interest rates unchanged and highlighting movements in equities, bonds, oil, gold, and cryptocurrency markets. Key company mentions include General Motors, Fortinet, First Solar, and Agnico Eagle.

feed.title: Great Lakes Advisors LLC Has $50.80 Million Stock Position in Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. $APD
feed.summary: Great Lakes Advisors LLC decreased its stake in Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. (NYSE:APD) by 34.3% in the third quarter, holding 186,250 shares valued at approximately $50.8 million. Despite this, other institutional investors increased their positions. Air Products and Chemicals recently reported slightly better-than-expected earnings for the quarter, announced Q1 and FY 2026 EPS guidance, and raised its quarterly dividend to $1.81.

feed.title: Laurus Global Equity Management Inc. Has $12.59 Million Stock Holdings in Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. $JKHY
feed.summary: Laurus Global Equity Management Inc. increased its stake in Jack Henry & Associates (NASDAQ:JKHY) by 7.5% in the third quarter, now holding 84,559 shares valued at $12.59 million, making it their fourth-largest position. Despite insider selling by a director and COO, institutional investors collectively own 98.75% of the company's stock. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with a target price of $195.82, following the company's recent beat on quarterly EPS and positive FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Laurus Global Equity Management Inc. Acquires New Shares in Gartner, Inc. $IT
feed.summary: Laurus Global Equity Management Inc. has acquired 14,580 shares of Gartner, Inc. (NYSE:IT) in Q3, making it the fund's 11th-largest holding. Meanwhile, Gartner's director Stephen G. Pagliuca significantly increased his stake by purchasing 43,300 shares, while an SVP sold a smaller number of shares. Analysts currently hold a consensus "Hold" rating on Gartner with a price target of $309.67, significantly above its current trading price of $225.88.

feed.title: Great Lakes Advisors LLC Cuts Holdings in Hasbro, Inc. $HAS
feed.summary: Great Lakes Advisors LLC reduced its stake in Hasbro, Inc. by 8.8% in Q3, selling 31,940 shares and now holding 330,712 shares worth approximately $25.08 million. Despite this, institutional ownership of Hasbro remains high at 91.83%, with major funds like Vanguard and State Street increasing their positions. The article also highlights Hasbro's new merchandising efforts and a shareholder lawsuit concerning Magic: The Gathering card overprinting.

feed.title: GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) Stock Rating Upgraded by Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research has upgraded GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) from a "hold" to a "strong-buy" rating. This upgrade follows GE's strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates with $1.57 EPS and $11.90 billion in revenue, and positive long-term catalysts including successful hybrid-electric engine tests with NASA. Despite some near-term margin pressure, Wall Street remains largely bullish on the stock, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and an average price target of $319.

feed.title: Autonomous Res Estimates Equifax FY2025 Earnings
feed.summary: Autonomous Res estimates Equifax's FY2025 earnings per share at $7.64, exceeding the consensus of $7.58, and has issued higher forecasts for subsequent years, signaling expected acceleration in earnings growth. Equifax shares are trading around $205 with a market cap of $25.1 billion and a P/E ratio near 39, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $271.14. Despite some price target cuts by brokers, institutional investors hold a significant portion of the company's stock, and Equifax recently announced new product solutions for auto dealers.

feed.title: Darden Restaurants, Inc. $DRI Stake Lowered by Great Lakes Advisors LLC
feed.summary: Great Lakes Advisors LLC reduced its stake in Darden Restaurants (NYSE:DRI) by 32.8% in the third quarter, impacting its ownership of the restaurant operator's stock. Despite missing quarterly EPS estimates, Darden beat revenue expectations and provided optimistic FY2026 guidance. The company also declared a quarterly dividend, while insiders sold a notable amount of shares.

feed.title: 3 in 4 with migraine say attacks hurt their romantic lives
feed.summary: AbbVie has launched "Love in Mind," an educational initiative highlighting the emotional impact of migraine on romantic relationships. A Harris Poll, underpinning the campaign, revealed that 89% of migraine sufferers struggle to be present in relationships, 51% cancel dates, and 78% push through pain for intimacy. The initiative features country artist Jessie James Decker sharing her personal experience and offers relationship guidance from therapist Nedra Glover Tawwab to foster open communication and better migraine management.

feed.title: Laurus Global Equity Management Inc. Has $16.95 Million Stock Holdings in PTC Inc. $PTC
feed.summary: Laurus Global Equity Management Inc. significantly reduced its stake in PTC Inc. by 16.4% in Q3, now holding 83,486 shares valued at $16.95 million, making it their largest holding. Despite this institutional activity, company insiders have been substantial sellers, offloading over $10.6 million worth of shares. Analysts currently rate PTC as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus price target suggesting upside from its current trading price.

feed.title: Great Lakes Advisors LLC Decreases Holdings in Prudential Financial, Inc. $PRU
feed.summary: Great Lakes Advisors LLC has reduced its stake in Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU) by 36%, selling 139,358 shares and ending the quarter with 247,393 shares valued at approximately $25.7 million. While institutional investors own a significant portion of the company, with 56.83% of the stock, major insider movements include Chairman Charles F. Lowrey selling shares and a major shareholder, Insurance Co Of Ame Prudential, increasing its stake by over 22%. Analysts currently have a consensus "Hold" rating for Prudential Financial, with an average target price of $120.78, and the company recently beat earnings estimates, reporting $4.26 EPS against a $3.72 estimate.

feed.title: Great Lakes Advisors LLC Has $32.29 Million Stake in Otis Worldwide Corporation $OTIS
feed.summary: Great Lakes Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE:OTIS) by 12,108% in Q3, now holding 353,178 shares valued at $32.29 million. This increase reflects institutional investor confidence, even as Otis's Q4 adjusted EPS matched expectations but revenue missed, primarily due to softer new equipment sales and demand in China. Despite revenue challenges, the company showed strong service-driven recovery, expanded service operating margins, generated robust cash flow, and provided a positive 2026 outlook with expected organic sales and adjusted EPS growth.

feed.title: Great Lakes Advisors LLC Sells 15,705 Shares of ON Semiconductor Corporation $ON
feed.summary: Great Lakes Advisors LLC reduced its stake in ON Semiconductor by 4.3%, selling 15,705 shares and holding 352,980 shares valued at $17.41 million. This reduction comes amidst other institutional investor activity and an insider sale by CFO Trent Thad. The company's recent Q3 earnings beat expectations, and despite a year-over-year revenue decline, the board authorized a $6.0 billion share buyback program.

feed.title: Forecasting The Future: 19 Analyst Projections For Lam Research
feed.summary: Nineteen analysts have evaluated Lam Research (NASDAQ: LRCX) in the past three months, with a collective average price target of $229.63, a 26.91% increase from the prior average. The majority of ratings are bullish, and the company demonstrates strong financial health with high revenue growth, net margin, and return on equity compared to industry peers. Lam Research is a major semiconductor wafer fabrication equipment manufacturer, specializing in deposition and etch.

feed.title: ICE’s Futures and Options Markets Reach Record Open Interest of 114 Million Contracts
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE:ICE) announced record open interest across its global futures and options markets, reaching over 114 million contracts on January 26, 2026, marking a 20% year-over-year increase. The report highlights record open interest in global commodities, energy, total oil, ICE Brent, and EU natural gas futures and options. This achievement underscores customer trust in ICE's deep liquidity and the interconnected energy landscape.

feed.title: Great Lakes Advisors LLC Has $37.95 Million Stock Holdings in Arch Capital Group Ltd. $ACGL
feed.summary: Great Lakes Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in Arch Capital Group Ltd. (NASDAQ:ACGL) by 99.1% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 418,320 shares valued at approximately $37.95 million. This move comes despite recent insider selling, with two key insiders liquidating shares worth over $20 million. Wall Street analysts currently rate ACGL as a "Hold" with an average target price of $107.53, while the company recently beat earnings expectations with $2.77 EPS.

feed.title: Astrotech Corp - To Offer Securities Worth $30 Million
feed.summary: Astrotech Corp announced its plan to offer securities valued at $30 million. This news, reported by Reuters, is pertinent to investors interested in US stocks and IPOs related to Astrotech Corp.

feed.title: Valero Energy: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Valero Energy Corp. reported a strong fourth quarter, with net income of $1.13 billion, or $3.73 per share. Adjusted earnings of $3.82 per share surpassed Wall Street estimates of $3.22 per share. The oil refiner also exceeded revenue expectations, posting $30.37 billion against an anticipated $28.06 billion.

feed.title: Rosenblatt upgrades Fortinet stock rating to Buy on strong channel checks
feed.summary: Rosenblatt Securities upgraded Fortinet (NASDAQ:FTNT) to Buy from Neutral and raised its price target to $100 from $85, citing strong channel checks indicating a "meaningful inflection in demand" for Fortinet products. The upgrade comes ahead of Fortinet's Q4 earnings report on February 5, 2026, with factors like a hardware refresh cycle, increased SASE adoption, and aggressive Q4 sales execution driving momentum. InvestingPro data highlights Fortinet's impressive 80.9% gross profit margins, supporting its ability to capitalize on this demand surge.

feed.title: Civista Bancshares, Inc. Announces Fourth-Quarter 2025 Financial Results of $0.61 per Common Share, and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results of $2.64 per Common Share
feed.summary: Civista Bancshares, Inc. reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025, with net income rising to $12.3 million ($0.61 per common share) and $46.2 million ($2.64 per common share) respectively. The company successfully completed the acquisition of The Farmers Savings Bank, significantly increasing its assets, loans, and deposits, and reaffirmed solid credit quality and a disciplined growth strategy. Non-recurring expenses related to the acquisition impacted fourth-quarter net income by $3.4 million pre-tax, yet the efficiency ratio continued to improve.

feed.title: What is Zacks Research's Estimate for LKQ Q3 Earnings?
feed.summary: Zacks Research has lowered its Q3 2026 EPS estimate for LKQ Corporation to $0.85 from $0.89 and downgraded the stock to a "Strong Sell," also trimming future forecasts. Despite this, the overall analyst consensus remains "Hold" with a price target of $44.33, contrasting with the current market price of around $32.57. LKQ recently reported Q4 earnings of $0.84 EPS, beating estimates, with revenue of $3.50 billion.

feed.title: Fair Isaac (FICO) Analyst Rating Reiterated by Needham | FICO St
feed.summary: Needham has reiterated its "Buy" rating for Fair Isaac (FICO) with an unchanged price target of $1975.00, expressing confidence in the company's potential. This reaffirmation comes amidst other recent analyst ratings, which have largely maintained a positive outlook on FICO, with some analysts raising price targets. The average one-year price target from 19 analysts is $2,025.72, suggesting a significant upside from its current price.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin: Fiscal Q2 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Parker-Hannifin Corp. reported strong fiscal second-quarter results, with net income of $845 million and earnings of $7.65 per share, exceeding analyst expectations of $7.15 per share. The motion and control products maker also surpassed revenue forecasts, posting $5.17 billion against an expected $5.04 billion. The company anticipates full-year earnings to be in the range of $30.40 to $31 per share.

feed.title: BD and Envetec Demonstrate Closed-Loop Recycling Solution for Laboratory Plastics in Health Care
feed.summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) and Envetec Sustainable Technologies have successfully completed a feasibility study demonstrating a closed-loop recycling solution for laboratory plastics. The study showed that polystyrene Petri dishes can be recycled into high-quality manufacturing feedstock using Envetec's GENERATIONS® technology, which safely disinfects and processes regulated waste into recyclable polymer flakes. This pilot opens the door for sustainable solutions for other high-volume healthcare consumables and aims to reduce reliance on virgin plastics and keep valuable materials in circulation.

feed.title: Altria Group files annual financial statements and audit reports with SEC
feed.summary: Altria Group, Inc. (NYSE:MO) has filed its annual consolidated financial statements and audit reports with the SEC, covering the financial years ending December 31, 2025. This filing includes balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow statements, along with reports from its independent public accounting firm regarding both the financials and internal controls. In related news, Altria announced CEO Billy Gifford's retirement, a quarterly dividend, and received adjusted price targets from Jefferies and UBS due to market segment pressures and performance factors.

feed.title: International Paper Q4 Earnings Summary & Key Takeaways
feed.summary: International Paper (NYSE: IP) reported its Q4 earnings, missing estimated EPS by 131.0% with an EPS of $-0.08 against an estimate of $0.26. Despite the EPS miss, revenue increased by $1.43 billion year-over-year. The company's stock previously saw no change following a Q3 2025 EPS miss.

feed.title: TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. Cuts Stock Holdings in Bank of America Corporation $BAC
feed.summary: TD Waterhouse Canada Inc. reduced its stake in Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) by 2.4% in the third quarter, selling 22,286 shares and ending the period with holdings valued at $45.37 million. Despite this, other institutional investors increased their positions in BAC, and analysts have largely maintained "buy" ratings with an average target price of $60.00. The article also provides a detailed financial overview of Bank of America and highlights recent news and analyst sentiments, including both positive and negative factors affecting the stock.
